overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a coastal tribal settlement. The character moves from a campfire encampment through canvas tents and wooden structures, then transitions onto a cliffside path with ancient stone ruins overlooking a bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal campfire encampment with canvas tents

agents.ego_description: standing near the campfire then turning and beginning to walk through the settlement

entered.detail: stone-ringed fire pit with smoke rising
tan canvas tent with wooden pole supports
stacked wooden barrels near the tent
rough wooden post fence enclosing the camp
tall reddish rocky cliffs in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a tribal campfire encampment with canvas tents and wooden structures. Aloy stands near the smoking fire pit before turning to walk through the settlement, with rocky cliffs visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open settlement area with stone archway and palm trees

events.description: exits the immediate campfire area into the wider settlement with stone architecture visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the settlement passing wooden carts and tents

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the large stone archway in the distance

entered.detail: large ornate stone archway with carved details marking settlement entrance
wooden wagon with large wheels and canvas covering
tall palm trees scattered throughout the settlement
large stone temple structure visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open settlement area, the stone archway becomes prominent in the center view while palm trees line the path. A villager stands near the archway in the distance as Aloy passes wooden carts and supply crates.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside trail with view of bay

events.description: leaves the settlement behind and enters the open coastal path along the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliffside path with the ocean view opening to the left

entered.detail: wide view of coastal bay with distant cliffs across the water
lush green ferns and tropical plants lining the path
tall ancient stone tower ruins visible ahead on the cliff

segments.scene_description: The settlement gives way to an open coastal trail with the bay visible to the left. The path runs alongside towering rocky cliffs on the right while tropical vegetation lines the edge. Ancient stone ruins become visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruin gateway on cliff edge

events.description: approaches and enters the ancient stone gateway structure
steps onto the elevated stone walkway between tall pillars

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone gateway and onto the ancient elevated walkway between ruins

entered.detail: massive carved stone gateway with geometric patterns
tall ancient stone pillars flanking the walkway
tall ancient stone pillars flanking the walkway
elevated stone bridge with carved paving stones

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters the ancient stone gateway, passing between massive carved pillars onto an elevated stone walkway. The path becomes cobblestone as it winds along the cliff edge, with the stone ruins now towering overhead and the bay visible through the archways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rustic tribal encampment toward the imposing heights of ancient coastal ruins. It begins at a smoking campfire surrounded by canvas tents and wooden structures, moving through the settlement as the camera follows Aloy past supply crates and wooden carts. As the path opens, the scene shifts toward a stone archway lined with palm trees before transitioning onto a coastal trail where the bay opens up to the left and towering rocky cliffs rise to the right. The movement then leads directly into a massive stone gateway, passing between carved pillars and onto an elevated cobblestone walkway. Finally, the camera winds along the cliff edge, with the ancient ruins towering overhead and the distant bay visible through the stone archways.
